summary: Iteration 8 - Multi-Partner Concurrent Assignment feature fully tested. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified and working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - minor cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: POST /api/leads/{id}/assign-partner - Assign first partner to lead (200 OK)
POST /api/leads/{id}/assign-partner - Assign second partner concurrently (200 OK)
POST /api/leads/{id}/assign-partner - Duplicate partner assignment rejected (400)
POST /api/leads/{id}/assign-partner - Invalid partner ID rejected (404)
POST /api/leads/{id}/mark-partner-won - Single partner marked as winner (200 OK)
POST /api/leads/{id}/mark-partner-won - Multiple partners: winner marked, others lost (200 OK)
POST /api/leads/{id}/mark-partner-won - Non-active partner rejected (400)
POST /api/leads/{id}/mark-partner-won - Unassigned partner rejected (400)
POST /api/leads/{id}/remove-partner - Partner removed (marked as lost) (200 OK)
POST /api/leads/{id}/remove-partner - Non-active partner removal rejected (400)
Lead Response - assigned_partners array present
Lead Response - active_partners_count field present
Partner Assignment - Correct structure (partner_id, partner_name, assigned_at, assigned_by, status, won_at, lost_at, notes)
Existing lead 1ff464e7-cb58-4b26-b538-cbf2a618febc - Multi-partner data verified
Permission test - Non-admin cannot assign partners (403)
Frontend: Assigned Partners section visible on LeadDetail page
Frontend: Status badges (Winner/Active/Lost) displayed correctly
Frontend: Assign Partner button and dialog working
Frontend: Partner select dropdown in dialog working
Frontend: Mark Won button visible for active partners
Frontend: Remove button visible for active partners
Frontend: Partner assignment success toast notification

assign_partner_endpoint.details: POST /api/leads/{id}/assign-partner correctly assigns additional partners. Validates partner exists, prevents duplicates, supports re-activation of lost partners.

mark_partner_won_endpoint.details: POST /api/leads/{id}/mark-partner-won marks one partner as winner, automatically marks other active partners as lost. Sets selling_partner_id to winner.

remove_partner_endpoint.details: POST /api/leads/{id}/remove-partner marks partner as lost with lost_at timestamp. Only works on active partners.

lead_response_structure.details: Lead response includes assigned_partners array with status (active/won/lost), won_at, lost_at timestamps. active_partners_count correctly counts active partners.

frontend_assigned_partners_section.details: LeadDetail page shows 'Assigned Partners (X active)' section with all partners listed. Each partner shows name, status badge, assigned_by, assigned_at, and relevant timestamps.

frontend_assign_partner_dialog.details: Assign Partner button opens dialog with partner dropdown. Dialog explains 'Multiple partners can work on the same lead concurrently'. Filters out already active partners.

frontend_action_buttons.details: Active partners show 'Mark Won' (green) and 'Remove' (red) buttons. Won/Lost partners do not show action buttons.

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_multi_partner_assignment.py - Created comprehensive test file for multi-partner assignment feature
seed_data_creation: Test leads and partners created during backend tests (TEST_Multi-Partner Lead, TEST_partner_*). Existing test lead 1ff464e7-cb58-4b26-b538-cbf2a618febc has 2 partners: New Partner (won), Admin Created SP (lost).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-partner concurrent assignment feature is fully working. Key endpoints: POST /api/leads/{id}/assign-partner, POST /api/leads/{id}/mark-partner-won, POST /api/leads/{id}/remove-partner. Lead response includes assigned_partners array with status field (active/won/lost) and active_partners_count. Frontend LeadDetail page shows Assigned Partners section with status badges and action buttons for active partners.
